advancedBuffs.0: Enchantress-shroom Subspecies Unlocked | Empress-shroom & Enchantress-shroom: Summon Interval → 10s
advancedBuffs.1: Empress-shroom & Enchantress-shroom: Can now summon Odyssey Zombies
advancedBuffs.2: Gatling Frenzy-shroom Subspecies Unlocked | Gatling Doom: No more rest after firing an Ultimate Doom Shell | Effects also apply to SP variants
advancedBuffs.3: Gatling Doom: Now fires a Ultimate Doom Shell every round instead of every 4th round | Gatling Frenzy-shroom: Now fires an Ultimate Doom Shell every 4 attacks | Effects also apply to SP variants
advancedBuffs.4: Twin Solar-nut: Click Cost 500 → 200 Sun | Twin Inferno-nut: Healing amount ×2 | Effects also apply to SP variants
advancedBuffs.5: Twin Inferno-nut Subspecies Unlocked | Twin Solar-nut: Toughness reduces by 10 for each hit instead of 50 | Twin Inferno-nut: Click cost 500 → 200 HP | Effects also apply to SP variants
advancedBuffs.6: Obsidian Spike-nut Subspecies Unlocked | Obsidian Spikerock & Spike-nut: Damage multiplied by 5
advancedBuffs.7: Obsidian Spikerock & Spike-nut: Gains 95% DMG Reduction
advancedBuffs.8: Phoenix Drone Subspecies Unlocked | Phoenix Threepeater & Phoenix Drone: Shots can now pierce infinitely and cause Enflamed explosions upon impact
advancedBuffs.9: Phoenix Threepeater: Global enflamed damage bonus 50% → 150%, and regular ignited projectiles can now inflict the debuff
advancedBuffs.10: Gatling Icicle-shroom & Sunburst-shroom: Icicles now pierce infinitely and split into two diagonal icicles upon impact the first five times
advancedBuffs.11: Gatling Sunburst-shroom Subspecies Unlocked | Gatling Icicle-shroom: Damage to Frozen/Chill-immune zombies 4× → 12×
advancedBuffs.12: Radiant Pot: Upgrade costs from Silver Pots to Golden Pots will not exceed 8k
advancedBuffs.13: Radiant Pot: Coins exceeding the maximum amount will be converted into Sun at a rate of 2:1
advancedBuffs.14: Aegis Umbrella Subspecies Unlocked | Midas Umbrella & Aegis Umbrella: Activates Ultimate automatically if zombies are near
advancedBuffs.16: Aristocattail: Drone Attack Damage ×3 | Thunder Bunnyon: Summoned Drone is no longer nerfed and fires 60 shots normally
advancedBuffs.17: Thunder Bunnyon Subspecies Unlocked | Aristocattail: Regular Attack Damage ×5 | Thunder Bunnyon: Attack Damage ×3
advancedBuffs.18: Avarice-shroom Subspecies Unlocked | Calamity-shroom: All Doom-shroom explosions are now craterless
advancedBuffs.19: Calamity-shroom: Now spawns 3 extra Hypnotized Gargantuars and Zombonis when it explodes
advancedBuffs.20: Tycoonwood & Magnate Plantern: 1% Damage increase to Coin projectiles/lasers for every 1000 Coins you have
advancedBuffs.21: Magnate Plantern Subspecies Unlocked | Tycoonwood: Coin projectiles now deal splash damage
advancedBuffs.22: Boreas Umbrella Subspecies Unlocked | Pharos Umbrella: Energy Limit ×10, Recovery Speed ×20, Healing Speed ×2 | Boreas Umbrella: Damage in Scatter Mode increases linearly up to ×4, Damage in Focus Mode ×4
advancedBuffs.23: Pharos Umbrella: Normal Attack Damage ×3, Explosion Damage ×10, Attack Interval → 2s | Boreas Umbrella: Cryo-beam in Focus Mode now applies Freeze for 1s
advancedBuffs.24: Buck-shroom Squad: Sniper always headshots with a 1/3 chance to trigger rapid-fire, but attack CD increased to 7.5s | Buck-strike Squadron: Attack damage ×3
advancedBuffs.25: Buck-strike Squadron Subspecies Unlocked | Buck-shroom Squad: Flak cannon knockback ×2, splash damage ×3 | Buck-strike Squadron: Attack damage ×3
advancedBuffs.26: Dyson Magnet Subspecies Unlocked | Tesla Magnet: Attack Range ×2 | Dyson Magnet: Metal Production CD halved
advancedBuffs.27: Tesla Magnet: Absorbs 3 Metal Objects at once, damage to Giga Trident-nut Zombies or Giga Football-nut Zombies ×3 | Dyson Magnet: Heal amount ×3, extra Metal Object production limit (3 + n/3) → (5 + n/2)
advancedBuffs.28: Grim Arbiter & Wicked Undertater: Seed packet drop is now guaranteed
advancedBuffs.29: Wicked Undertater Subspecies Unlocked | Grim Arbiter & Wicked Undertater: Zombie Soul damage transfer ×2
advancedBuffs.30: Big Bang Cherry & Big Crunch Squash: Radiation Zone initial duration increased from 7s to 10s
advancedBuffs.31: Big Crunch Squash Subspecies Unlocked | Big Bang Cherry & Big Crunch Squash: Explosive cherries and Ultimate Doom Shells have a 1% chance of transforming into Nuclear Debris with 12× damage when they hit zombies
advancedBuffs.32: Cornposter Pot Subspecies Unlocked | Cornveyor Weed & Cornposter Pot: Cornveyor and Cornposter's Butter stun duration ×3
advancedBuffs.33: Cornveyor Weed: Now makes zombies on it to continuously slide to the right | Cornposter Pot: Butter Chance for the plant above 50% → 100%
advancedBuffs.34: Omni Pumpkin: On entry, grants all connected Magnetic Plants a Shield equal to 30 × number of Magnetic Plants | Quasar: On entry, resets and grants them an Attack buff of 0.5% × number of Magnetic Plants instead
advancedBuffs.35: Omni Pumpkin & Quasar: Now counts twice towards the number of Magnetic Plants
advancedBuffs.37: Dragonbreath Torcher: Each zombie hit by Dragonbreath Torcher's fire breath increases the damage of the next hit of that same attack by 1%, stacking up to 400%
advancedBuffs.1000: Gloves' cooldown is reduced by 10s (No CD for the plant Glove), and can now move Mini-bosses
advancedBuffs.1002: Each Sun now gives more value | 5 → 15 → 25 → 50 → 75
advancedBuffs.1003: Gloves' cooldown is halved, and can now move Mini-bosses
advancedBuffs.1006: You now have the option to re-pick your Plant Loadout during the game
advancedBuffs.1007: Zombies take an additional 1800 damage when they take more than 1800 damage (after damage reduction)
advancedBuffs.1011: The freeze time of all zombies is increased by 25%, and the slow rate from chill is increased by 10%
advancedBuffs.1012: Gain 3000 Sun, then double your total amount of Sun after | Sun Cap 50k → 100k
advancedBuffs.1013: True Cherry Bomb: Explosive cherries will now deal at least 1800 damage and cause Cremator damage
advancedBuffs.1014: Clicking on the same plant when you have it on your Glove will disassemble it at the cost of 500 Sun | 20s cooldown
advancedBuffs.1015: When two identical plants are placed one above the other (adjacent in the same column), they gain a 50% damage bonus and a 50% damage reduction
advancedBuffs.1016: Hypnotized zombies gain a 500% damage buff and 80% damage reduction (WARNING: Also causes Cherry Newspaper Zombies from Empress/Enchantress-shroom to not lose their newspaper on summon!!)
advancedBuffs.1017: All Meteors' attack cooldowns are halved | Base Meteor DMG increased by 300 for every Magnetar in the field
advancedBuffs.1018: Adds 4 Lumos Levels for the entire field
advancedBuffs.1019: When hypnotized zombies die, they explode, dealing damage equal to 150% of their max HP to nearby zombies
advancedBuffs.2000: True Doom-shroom: Doom-shroom rounds will now release a craterless Doom-shroom explosion upon impact
advancedBuffs.2002: You can upgrade 1 upgradable Epic Modifier
advancedBuffs.2003: If a Plant Type has dealt the highest total damage on the field, its attacks deal an extra 30% of original damage as true damage
advancedBuffs.2004: After firing 50 times (25 for catapults), plants gain an unlimited attack speed for 1s
advancedBuffs.2005: Plants gain 1% life steal, applied to the plant with the lowest HP percentage on the field
advancedBuffs.2006: The longer since a zombie was last damaged, the more damage it takes from the next hit. <1s: Damage * (1 + 9t); ≥1s: Damage * (10 + 9ln(t))
advancedBuffs.2007: Gains the Corrupt Sac. Corruption effect: each time a Zombie is damaged, the next instance of damage to it is increased by 5% (stackable)
advancedBuffs.2008: You can remove 1 non-mini-boss Zombie Modifier from the View Modifier menu
advancedBuffs.3000: When Cherrizilla and Obsidian Tall-nut (or their subspecies) are both present, Cherrizilla/Garlizilla no longer has a maximum Toughness cap, and Obsidian Tall-nut/Obsidian Mine gains a 90% damage reduction
advancedBuffs.3001: If there are at least 10 Magnetars and 10 Helios Cabbages on the field, the Mini Sun summoned by the Helios Cabbage will never disappear and deal 5× damage, and will keep summoning Helios Meteors
advancedBuffs.3002: Gatling Cherrybomber now spreads its shots evenly across three lanes with sine and cosine trajectories, and Infernal Squashwood and its subspecies triggers a full-field Jalapeno effect if it can't plant a Spicy plant
advancedBuffs.3003: When there are at least 10 Magnetars and 10 Selene Cabbages on the field, Selene's summoned Mini Moon will not disappear, while each Magnetar and Selene will charge a beam into the Mini Moon, which redirects it to target the zombie with the most amount of HP
advancedBuffs.3004: Hail melons from Maelonstrom's Nebula Rifts now deal 6× damage and create Singularities, and Quantum McCornics always lob Ultimate Black Holes. When an Ultimate Black Hole collapses, it also detonates all Singularities to further increase its own damage
advancedBuffs.3005: Click on a reloaded Vulcannon while holding an Epic Twin Inferno-nut with the Glove to make all reloaded Vulcannon on the field perform a synergized attack towards the sky. Every 8th Inferno Shell shot calls down an Inferno Meteor dealing 80× damage, decimating all zombies on the screen
advancedBuffs.3006: When Cherrybomber Drone is placed above Epic Gatling Frenzy-shroom, the more they attack, the more bullets they fire in the next volley. This bonus decays after they stop attacking. (WARNING: Will lead to cancerous amounts of projectiles!!)
advancedBuffs.3007: Photon Splitter can lock onto any Atomheart Plantern ahead (click to select) to charge it. When energy exceeds 10k, its brightness increases, dealing heavy damage and slowing zombies in its radius. At 100k, collapses into a black hole and explodes, devastating all zombies on screen. (WARNING: Contains flashing lights)
advancedBuffs.3008: When Litter-pult and Gatling Icicle-shroom are planted on the same tile, the latter's projectiles split one additional time. Both plants' normal and special projectiles inherit some properties from each other's shots. (WARNING: Will cause lag)
advancedBuffs.4000: Summons an Abyssal Chibi to fight for you (replaces current Pet). His hammer smash damages both nearby plants and zombies, grants damage reduction to affected plants, and deals increased damage to zombies based on nearby plants' HP. Hammer effects scale with xp level
advancedBuffs.4001: Summons a Striker Junior to fight for you (replaces current Pet). Every 3s, he moves to the plant with the lowest HP percentage and rallies the area, healing nearby plants and increasing damage taken by zombies. Rally effects scale with xp level
advancedBuffs.4002: Summons a Prototype Iceborg to fight for you (replaces current Pet). She targets the highest-HP lane and fires ice projectiles. Damage increases based on the number of chilled/frozen zombies, and gains infinite pierce & bonus xp if the Iceborg Executrix is on the field. Projectile damage scale with xp level
advancedBuffs.4003: Summons a Baby Jill to fight for you (replaces current Pet). Every 15s, she performs a random attack: summons high-tier hypnotized Clown-in-the-Box zombies per lane or throws out explosives (lane-wide or global). Explosion damage scales with xp level
advancedBuffs.4004: Summons a Mini Pozeidon to fight for you (replaces current Pet). Every 5s, he throws his trident ahead, which pierces and damages zombies with explosions. If the mini-boss Pozeidon is present, throws 4 tridents every 10s instead
advancedBuffs.5000: Plants deal +100% to Mini-bosses and Bosses
advancedBuffs.5001: Plants gain a 5% damage bonus for every Zombie Modifier you have
advancedBuffs.5003: Plants deal ×2 damage but receive ×4 damage
advancedBuffs.5004: Seed packets no longer need recharge but each use costs 15× their base Sun + 50% of the player's current Sun
advancedBuffs.6003: Gatling Cherrybomber Mastery I: Cherry and other variants of projectiles' explosion radius +50% and damage +100%
advancedBuffs.6004: Gatling Cherrybomber Mastery II: Cherry and other variants of projectiles' explosion radius -50%  but damage +300%
advancedBuffs.6005: Doominator Mastery I: Frozen zombies take +50% more damage
advancedBuffs.6006: Doominator Mastery II: Hypnotized zombies deal 3× damage
advancedBuffs.6007: Infernal Squashwood Mastery I: Jalapeno effect changes from instant to DoT, dealing 1/3 the original damage 10 times within 1s
advancedBuffs.6008: Infernal Squashwood Mastery II: Grants projectiles +50% damage before igniting them
advancedBuffs.6009: Plants in the fifth column get 50% increased maximum Toughness and 50% damage reduction. Each column to the left reduces damage cap by 10% and increases damage reduction by 10%
advancedBuffs.10001: Immediately gain 2 Giga Mecha-nut seed packets which start with 1M HP
advancedBuffs.10002: Upgrade (1+n) random plants to Tier 1, where n is the number of Plant modifiers you currently have
advancedBuffs.10003: Increase the speed of (1+n) random plants, where n is the number of Plant modifiers you currently have
advancedBuffs.10004: Gain an Undying Totem. The next time zombies reach the house, it is ignored for 3s and knock all zombies back to the start
advancedBuffs.10005: Gain the seed packet of all Epic Odyssey Fusions (no Subspecies)
advancedBuffs.10006: Knock all zombies back to the start, then instantly defeat all zombies
advancedBuffs.10007: Gain a Super Blizzard Commando with +1500% damage and HP, +1000% speed, and gain an extra Coldsnap Bean
advancedBuffs.10008: Gain a random Odyssey plant. Each new zombie wave, it gains +25% damage, +25% HP, and +10% speed
advancedBuffs.10009:
Gain a Shroomageddon seed packet. Planting it ACCEPTS the challenge:
Summon 3-6 random Odyssey zombies in each lane (yeah, ALL possible ones)
Defeat them all to unlock the Modifier "Corrupt Sac"
advancedBuffs.10011: All plants gain 50 + (2% max HP) shield per second
advancedBuffs.10012: Gain the Saurian Medallion. When you have 20 or more plants on the field, zombies reaching the house no longer results in game over, but causes all plants to have 1/3 chance to die instead
advancedBuffs.10013:
Gain an Omni Pumpkin seed packet. Planting it ACCEPTS the challenge:
The number of zombies in the next 20 waves are doubled
Get through and all plants on the Omni Pumpkin's tile will be promoted to Tier 3
advancedBuffs.10014: Unleash all current lawnmowers and restore one full column of them
advancedBuffs.10015: You will not game over if you manage to kill the zombie reaching your house within 1.5s
advancedBuffs.10017: Upon gaining a second copy of any plant for the first time, you receive an additional seed packet of that plant
advancedBuffs.10018: Using the glove to move a plant onto another plant of the same type and tier upgrades it by 1 tier
advancedBuffs.10019: Immediately gain 10 Golden Recycling Vases. Additionally, receive 1 per wave and 5 per flag (huge wave)

ultimateBuffs.1: Cherrizilla & Garlizilla: Devour CD reduced to 15s
ultimateBuffs.2: Gatling Cherrybomber: Explosive cherries from plants ×3 damage
ultimateBuffs.3: Gatling Cherrybomber & Cherrybomber Drone: Attack Speed +100%
ultimateBuffs.4: Doominator: Attack speed ×3; Thornminator attack damage ×3; Iceclaw Zombie attack damage ×3
ultimateBuffs.5: Doominator: Zombies will take 30% of their current health as damage when unfrozen
ultimateBuffs.6: Infernal Squashwood & Sparkwood: Projectiles required to spawn a Spicy plant are halved
ultimateBuffs.7: Infernal Squashwood & Sparkwood: Ignites the lane immediately when spawning a Spicy plant is not possible
ultimateBuffs.9: Magnetar: Lv1: Base damage ×2 and damage cap (300) increased to 3000; Lv2: Base damage ×3, damage cap removed
ultimateBuffs.10: Shroomageddon: Explosion damage on death → 1M | Atomheart Plantern: Lumos boost on death ×3
ultimateBuffs.11: Shroomageddon & Atomheart Plantern: Now immune to Cherry and Jack-in-the-Box explosions. After resisting 10k points of explosive damage, triggers a Doom-shroom explosion
ultimateBuffs.12: Wither-pult & Rot-pult: Spread-fire is now guaranteed
ultimateBuffs.13: Wither-pult & Rot-pult: Lv1: Stacking Poison points will immediately poison the zombie and Poison Value Cap → 120; Lv2: Poison Value Cap removed
ultimateBuffs.14: Cob-literator: Main Blast damage ×4 | Panmelonium: Damage ×4
ultimateBuffs.16: Obsidian Tall-Nut & Obsidian Mine: Max HP Cap ×3
ultimateBuffs.17: Obsidian Tall-nut & Obsidian Mine: Can now absorb the damage directed to the two plants on its left and right
ultimateBuffs.18: Charmatron: Hypnotization HP threshold increased from 60% to 100% | Pumpkaptivator: Damage to captured hypnotized Zombies halved
ultimateBuffs.19: Charmatron: Attack Interval → 1s, Charge Level will not drop below 2 and can be fed metal to reach Charge Level 3 for 5 mins | Pumpkaptivator: Charge Level 3 unlocked
ultimateBuffs.21: Apeacalypse Minigun: Lv1: Doing Ultimate move refunds 50k energy; Lv2: Ultimate also deals 20% bonus damage that ignores DR | Apeacalypse Railgun: Lv1: Defense increases as Toughness decreases. Below 500 HP, becomes immune to damage under 1k; Lv2: Below 500 HP, base damage ×2
ultimateBuffs.22: Helios Cabbage: When Sun exceeds 15k, each of Helios Cabbage's attacks consumes 0.5% of the excess to boost projectile damage by 20 per 1 Sun spent | Selene Cabbage: Damage increased by 3× per Lumos Level
ultimateBuffs.23: Helios Cabbage: Mini Sun deals 3× damage | Selene Cabbage: Mini Moon heals 3×
ultimateBuffs.25: Laser Pumpkin: Wingmen and Drone DMG ×3
ultimateBuffs.26: Napalm-shroom: Charging speed and max charging duration ×3
ultimateBuffs.27: Napalm-shroom: Inferno now lasts 5s (twice as long)
ultimateBuffs.28: Kelptain Goldbeard: Plants deal 5% more attack damage for every 1000 points owned (up to +300%)
ultimateBuffs.29: Kelptain Goldbeard: The Odyssey shop now has a 30% discount on Modifiers
ultimateBuffs.30: Quantum McCornics: Ultimate Black Hole can absorb all projectiles
ultimateBuffs.31: Quantum McCornics: Ultimate Black Hole's absorption radius ×2
ultimateBuffs.32: Lifereaver Spruce: Boreal reaper saws now last for 15s | Soulrender Bamboo: Now receives only 1/3 incoming damage
ultimateBuffs.33: Lifereaver Spruce: Healing is no longer split among plants | Soulrender Bamboo: HP and Shield recovery ×2
ultimateBuffs.35: Tyrannoflora Lux: Provides 2 Lumos Level to a 5×5 area during digestion
ultimateBuffs.36: Vulcannon: Volcanic Bombs Damage ×3 | Kaledera Eruptor: Pyro Cabbages Damage ×3
ultimateBuffs.37: Vulcannon: Now triggers Thermonuclear Detonations when main blasts strike Cherry Bombs or Jalapenos | Kaledera Eruptor: 10% chance to trigger Cherry Bomb and Jalapeno effects at the barrel position and ignore the target limit of 10
ultimateBuffs.38: Princess Solarnova: When a solar shot hits a zombie, it cause nearby projectiles to explode as well
ultimateBuffs.39: Princess Solarnova: Energy cap ×3, Sun production amount after storage overflow ×3
ultimateBuffs.40: Maelonstrom: Nebula Rift now focuses on the zombie with the least HP for the first half of the barrage | Fungularity: Now only creates one set of portals, but they spawn ×10 ice particle streams
ultimateBuffs.41: Maelonstrom: Cryo-melon damage ×6, but with decreased splash radius | Maelonstrom & Fungularity: Zombies immune to Chronoshift will still take damage equal to (Elapsed Time)% of their HP
ultimateBuffs.44: Scylla Leviathan: Tangler minions can drown up to 3 zombies (or deal ×3 damage), and each zombie drowned rewards 10 energy stacks
ultimateBuffs.45: Scylla Leviathan: Fires 3 base attack projectiles at once
ultimateBuffs.46: Cryolina Reaper & Reaprika: Soul charge cap increased to 10, now gains 1 soul charge whenever a Mini-boss dies
ultimateBuffs.47: Cryolina Reaper & Reaprika: When using a soul charge, also grants 1s of invincibility to all plants
ultimateBuffs.48: Photon Splitter: Lv1: Lumos energy cap increase from 1000 to 2000; Lv2: Lumos energy cap further increased to 10k | Axion Splitter: Projectile damage radius +50%
ultimateBuffs.49: Photon Splitter: Boosts Transfer efficiency by 50%, and by 250% if target's energy < 1000 | Axion Splitter: Now fires 2 extra projectiles each attack
ultimateBuffs.50: Buckshot Commando: All Commandos Ultimate Trigger chances ×3 | Synchronizer Snipea: All Snipeas now fire an extra shot after a Headshot
ultimateBuffs.51: Buckshot Commando: All Commandos Ultimate Damage ×2 and no longer spread | Synchronizer Snipea: All Snipeas required shots before triggering Headshot -3

debuffs.0: Gatling Cherry Newspaper Zombie: Ability to walk through plants when its newspaper's broken
debuffs.1: Gatling Cherry Newspaper Zombie: Now immune to all status effects
debuffs.2: Giga Football-nut Zombie: Bites now disable plant healing for 1s
debuffs.3: Giga Football-nut Zombie: Bites weaken plants, making them receive 3× damage for 1s
debuffs.4: Sharkmarine: Movement speed is now doubled
debuffs.6: Kirov Zomppelin: Immunity to Blovers | Increased Movement Speed
debuffs.7: Kirov Zomppelin: Summoned Drones now have 50× HP
debuffs.8: Clown-on-the-Pogo Zombie: Now always explodes on death, and big leap charging time is reduced by 90% | Clown-on-the-Jetski Zombie: Bomb damage +500
debuffs.9: Clown-on-the-Pogo Zombie: Jack-in-the-Box-type Zombies affected by the explosion will turn into Clown-on-the-Pogo Zombies | Clown-on-the-Jetski Zombie: Bomb damage +500
debuffs.10: Giga Trident-nut Zombie: Now does 2 extra scatters each attack
debuffs.11: Giga Trident-nut Zombie: Now ignores Umbrella-type plants and targets random plants to attack
debuffs.12: Superstar Zombie: Can now summon Super Dancing Pole Vaulters
debuffs.13: Superstar Zombie: Will now phase through plants when sliding in
debuffs.14: Undying Wraith: Explosion damage will now ignore immunities by Joker Pumpkins and other relevant plants
debuffs.15: Undying Wraith: Dash CD reduced | Attack Power Greatly Increased
debuffs.16: Trident Hwacha: Now immune to most status effects and throws 5× as many tridents
debuffs.17: Trident Hwacha: Now attacks in advance
debuffs.18: Michael Zomboni: Now spawns every round | Spawns an extra Superstar Zombies when it dies
debuffs.19: Michael Zomboni: Greatly increased movement Speed
debuffs.20: Bungee Zombies have a chance to drop an Odyssey Zombie in the 4th column or further to the right and will gain 90% DMG Reduction
debuffs.21: Alpha Assassin Squad can now recover from being incapacitated infinitely
debuffs.22: Frost Legion Frayer Disc: Dissolver Beams now target the farthest plant within range
debuffs.23: Frost Legion Frayer Disc: Siphon Drainer's range: 1 Tile → 3×3 Area
debuffs.24: Element-infused Gargantuar: Appearance no longer matters, now has the extra abilities of all four affinities at once
debuffs.25: Element-infused Gargantuar: Appearance no longer matters, now has the debuff immunities of all four affinities at once
debuffs.26: Trident Jugger-nut Gargantuar: Trident reload Speed ×3
debuffs.27: Trident Jugger-nut Gargantuar: Now recovers 10% max HP when throwing tridents
debuffs.28: Giga Mecha-nut: For the first 50 hits, all zombies take only 1 damage
debuffs.29: Giga Mecha-nut: All zombies gain 0.2s of damage immunity after each hit to any damage that does not exceed the previous one; this triggers up to 100 times
debuffs.1000: Your Sun will be reset to 0
debuffs.1001: Your Points will be reset to 0
debuffs.1002: You can have no more than 120 plants on the field
debuffs.1003: All your existing plants have a 1/3 chance to perish (applied once)
debuffs.1004: Zombie max HP increment rate after each round: 20% → 30%
debuffs.1005: All zombies have a 1/3 chance to revive to full HP on death
debuffs.1006: Increase the maximum limit of zombies per wave to 100
debuffs.1007: The maximum number of zombies each wave is halved, but all zombies have ×2 HP and Attack
debuffs.1008: All healing and shields on Plants are reduced by 50%
debuffs.1009: Plants lose max HP equal to 10% of the damage received (capped at 40% and resets between rounds) when taking damage
debuffs.1011: Time before the first wave of zombie is reduced to 5s, and the interval between zombie waves is reduced to 15s
debuffs.1012: Odyssey Plants' Attack and max HP reduced by 90%, but all other plants now have 40× Attack & max HP, and 2× Attack Speed
debuffs.1013: Mini-boss zombies gain a 60% Speed buff and 30% max HP buff
debuffs.1014: Non-mini-boss zombies gain a 30% Speed buff and 60% max HP buff
debuffs.1015: Flying zombies now have 2× max HP
debuffs.1016: When Plants are killed, they deal damage equal to their max HP to other plants in a 3×3 Area
debuffs.1017: All non-mini-boss zombies now have ×2 HP, Attack and Speed
debuffs.2001: Gatling Doom Newspaper Zombie will appear
debuffs.3000: Abyssal Gargantuar will appear as a Mini-boss
debuffs.3001: Abyssal Gargantuar: Spawns Dr. Zomboss when it dies
debuffs.3002: Imperor's Ark of the Duck will appear as a Mini-boss
debuffs.3003: Imperor's Ark of the Duck: The Imperor now recovers 500 HP every time he dodges an attack
debuffs.3004: Jackson Worldwide will appear as a Mini-boss
debuffs.3005: Jackson Worldwide: Now gains a 50% incoming Damage Reduction
debuffs.3006: Giga Football Striker will appear as a Mini-boss
debuffs.3007: Giga Football Striker: Now gains buffs 2× faster
debuffs.3008: Pozeidon will appear as a Mini-boss
debuffs.3010: Ultra Mecha-nut will appear as a Mini-boss
debuffs.3012: Skystrider Mecha will appear as a Mini-boss
debuffs.3014: Professor Cherryz will appear as a Mini-boss
debuffs.3016: Queen Jill-in-the-Box will appear as a Mini-boss
debuffs.3018: Omega Assassin Squad will appear as a Mini-boss
debuffs.3020: Giga Football Archduke will appear as a Mini-boss
debuffs.3022: Millennium Dragon & Warden will appear as a Mini-boss
debuffs.4000: Abyssal Gargantuar grants +400 DR value to all zombies while present
debuffs.4001: Imperor's Ark of the Duck grants +400 DR value to all zombies while present
debuffs.4002: Giga Football Striker grants +400 DR value to all zombies while present
debuffs.4003: Jackson Worldwide grants +400 DR value to all zombies while present
debuffs.5000: Zombies gain a stalling status effect immunity for 3s after being continuously under any such effect for 5s
debuffs.5001: The Attack damage of all zombies on the field is doubled every 3s, up to 1M
debuffs.5002: Zombies gain DR value equal to 1% of the incoming damage when they receive damage more than 100, up to +1000 DR value
debuffs.5003: Zombies deal 100% damage back to plants when they dodge an attack, with a CD of 0.2s

investmentBuffs.0: Plants do 40% more damage in the first 50% of the round
investmentBuffs.1: At the end of each round, gain 300 points for every type of plant that dealt 0 damage this round (up to 10 plant types)
investmentBuffs.2: At the end of each round, gain 1.5k points and 5% more max HP for all your plants if none of your plants reached 0 HP in this round
investmentBuffs.3: Turn all plants on the lawn into random plants, gain 1000 points immediately and the Glove will have no CD in this round
investmentBuffs.4: Immediately gain 10 random Odyssey plants as seed packets
investmentBuffs.5: Every time a Mini-boss is defeated, all plants heal for 10% of their max HP
investmentBuffs.6: All non-mini-boss Zombies have 10% less HP
investmentBuffs.8: Every wave, 1500% base damage is dealt to the zombie with the most HP
investmentBuffs.9: The plant type that deals the most damage deals an additional 25% damage
investmentBuffs.10: At the start of every round, your plants gain 3% damage reduction for every type of non-Odyssey plant on the lawn, up to 30%
investmentBuffs.11: At the start of every round, the 6 plants with the most damage gain a 20% damage boost
investmentBuffs.12: You gain 6 extra rerolls in the Shop if you didn't buy anything from the last visit
investmentBuffs.1000: <color=#AF4900>Shovel all of your plants, but your Sun is doubled, and at the start of every round all plants gain Shield equal to the total amount of Sun cost of the plants shoveled
investmentBuffs.1001: <color=#AF4900>Shovel all of your plants, but your Sun is doubled, and Seed packets have no CD in this round
investmentBuffs.1002: <color=#AF4900>Your teams gain an 18% chance to crit
investmentBuffs.1003: <color=#AF4900>At the start of every round, your plants gain 3% more HP and 6% more attack damage for every type of plant on the lawn
investmentBuffs.1004: <color=#AF4900>The plant type that deals the most damage deals an additional 40% damage and your teams also do 10% more damage
investmentBuffs.1005: <color=#AF4900>At the start of every round, the leftmost regular plant in every lane gains a 150% attack speed boost, but at the start of every wave, they receive damage equal to 1000% of their max HP
investmentBuffs.1006: <color=#AF4900>At the start of every round, the leftmost regular plant on every lane gains a damage boost equal to 0.1% of the rightmost regular plant's max HP, and the rightmost regular plant gains max HP equal to 1000% of the leftmost regular plant's damage
investmentBuffs.1007: <color=#AF4900>At the start of every round, your teams gain a 25% chance to crit, and 30% reduced max HP
investmentBuffs.1008: <color=#AF4900>Your teams gain a 10% chance to crit. At the start of every round, that chance is increased by 1%
investmentBuffs.1009: <color=#AF4900>Your teams gain a 10% attack damage boost. At the start of every round, if there are 200 or more plants in your teams, all plants gain an additional 50% attack damage boost
investmentBuffs.1010: <color=#AF4900>At the start of every round and now, gain 1.5k points and an extra reroll
investmentBuffs.1011: <color=#AF4900>At the start of every round, promote a random non-Odyssey plant to Tier 2
investmentBuffs.1012: <color=#AF4900>You gain a Plant Giftbox every time you perform a fusion
investmentBuffs.1013: <color=#AF4900>Your plants do 40% more damage in the last 50% of the round
investmentBuffs.2000: <color=#007FFF>Your teams gain a 25% chance to crit. They also gain a chance equal to 30% of their crit chance to reduce any incoming damage to 1
investmentBuffs.2001: <color=#007FFF>Your teams gain 25% damage reduction, and crit chance equal to their damage reduction rate
investmentBuffs.2002: <color=#007FFF>At the start of every round, every plant has a 50% chance to gain a 100% attack damage boost
investmentBuffs.2003: <color=#007FFF>Your teams gain a permanent 8% attack damage boost every time a Mini-boss is defeated
investmentBuffs.2004: <color=#007FFF>At the start of every round, promote a random non-Odyssey plant to Tier 3
investmentBuffs.2005: <color=#007FFF>Increase your teams' crit chance by 30%. If the crit chance is above 100%, crit damage is increased by 40%
investmentBuffs.2006: <color=#007FFF>A super rare Endoflame that holds a ton of Points appears (you gain 20k Points)
investmentBuffs.2007: <color=#007FFF>Immediately gain 5k points. From now on, you gain 3k points if you enter into the next round without buying anything from the Shop
investmentBuffs.2008: <color=#007FFF>You have a 45% chance to gain an extra reroll when you reroll
investmentBuffs.2009: <color=#007FFF>At the start of every round, gain 2k points
investmentBuffs.2010: <color=#007FFF>At the start of each round, gain a Stellar Imitater. If used on a plant with a Stellar form, it becomes that plant's Stellar variant
investmentBuffs.2011: <color=#007FFF>Gain 500 points every time you reroll in the Shop or when selecting Zombie Modifiers
investmentBuffs.2012: <color=#007FFF>Deplete all of your current points. For every 1k points depleted, your plants gain a 1% chance to crit
investmentBuffs.2013: <color=#007FFF>For this round only, you gain 10k points and win the round if a zombie enters your house
